level_definition.name: 进阶
level_definition.description: 多从句、隐含意思、快速口语模式

entries.text: Miss, Kunjiya is pinching me, miss
entries.tanglish_text: Miss, Kunjiya is pinching me, miss
entries.english_translation: Miss, Kunjiya is pinching me, miss

entries.text: C, the Athenian tribes fought against the mighty Persians
entries.tanglish_text: C, the Athenian tribes fought against the mighty Persians
entries.english_translation: C, the Athenian tribes fought against the mighty Persians

entries.text: - Okay, sir - Brother - Such a pain
entries.tanglish_text: - Okay, sir - Brother - Such a pain
entries.english_translation: - Okay, sir - Brother - Such a pain

entries.text: You see, my name is my problem It's nothing
entries.tanglish_text: You see, my name is my problem It's nothing
entries.english_translation: You see, my name is my problem. It's nothing

entries.text: After this year, we'll talk to the school- Mom
entries.tanglish_text: After this year, we'll talk to the school- Mom
entries.english_translation: After this year, we'll talk to the school- Mom

entries.text: But we don't always address each other with our full names, right
entries.tanglish_text: But we don't always address each other with our full names, right
entries.english_translation: But we don't always address each other with our full names, right

entries.text: Come here That day I wished I had never won Son, be patient
entries.tanglish_text: Come here That day I wished I had never won Son, be patient
entries.english_translation: Come here That day I wished I had never won Son, be patient

entries.text: I'm getting late Just 5 minutes It's getting ready Mom, it's getting late
entries.tanglish_text: I'm getting late Just 5 minutes It's getting ready Mom, it's getting late
entries.english_translation: I'm getting late Just 5 minutes It's getting ready Mom, it's getting late

entries.text: C for you Hey, will you refuse to come to school for all this
entries.tanglish_text: C for you Hey, will you refuse to come to school for all this
entries.english_translation: C for you Hey, will you refuse to come to school for all this

entries.text: Bloody, change your name if you want to Just don't come near my shop anymore
entries.tanglish_text: Bloody, change your name if you want to Just don't come near my shop anymore
entries.english_translation: Bloody, change your name if you want to Just don't come near my shop anymore
